title: Radiology Report Fact Extraction Schema
description: Schema for structured facts extracted from a single radiology report in Module 2 radiology fact extraction.

note_id.description: Unique radiology note identifier in the MIMIC-style report format, for example 10046097-RR-34.

subject_id.description: Patient subject identifier associated with the radiology report.

exam_name.description: Original exam name or study label from the report header, such as CT CHEST W/CONTRAST.

modality.description: Normalized imaging modality for the report.

body_site.description: Normalized body site primarily covered by the imaging exam.

report_text.description: Full original radiology report text before downstream structuring or normalization.

sections.description: Report sections parsed from the original text when available; absent keys indicate the section was not detected.

indication.description: Clinical indication section describing the reason for the exam.

technique.description: Technique section describing how the imaging exam was performed.

comparison.description: Comparison section containing prior studies or reference exams.

findings.description: Findings section containing detailed imaging observations.

impression.description: Impression section summarizing the radiologist's main conclusions.

nodule_count.description: Number of nodules identified in the report, or null when the count cannot be determined reliably.

nodules.description: Structured list of nodule-level facts extracted from the report.

nodule_id_in_report.description: 1-indexed position of the nodule mention within the report-level extraction output.

size_mm.description: Normalized nodule size in millimeters, or null when no normalized size can be extracted.

size_text.description: Original size expression copied from the report, such as 4 mm or 1 cm.

density_category.description: Normalized density or attenuation category for the nodule.

density_text.description: Original density-related wording from the report text.

location_lobe.description: Normalized lung lobe location for the nodule.

location_text.description: Original text span describing the nodule location, such as right middle lobe.

count_type.description: Whether the report frames this nodule mention as a single lesion, multiple lesions, or unclear multiplicity.

change_status.description: Normalized longitudinal change status relative to prior imaging.

change_text.description: Original wording that supports the extracted change status, such as unchanged from prior exam.

calcification.description: Whether the report explicitly indicates calcification of the nodule.

spiculation.description: Whether the report explicitly indicates spiculation of the nodule.

lobulation.description: Whether the report explicitly indicates lobulation of the nodule.

cavitation.description: Whether the report explicitly indicates cavitation of the nodule.

perifissural.description: Whether the report explicitly identifies the nodule as perifissural.

lung_rads_category.description: Lung-RADS category assigned in the report when present.

recommendation_cue.description: Follow-up or management cue copied from the report text for this nodule mention.

evidence_span.description: Exact text span from which the nodule facts were extracted.

confidence.description: Model confidence level for the structured nodule extraction.

missing_flags.description: List of nodule field names that could not be extracted from the evidence span.

items.description: Name of a nodule-level field that was missing or could not be resolved.

extraction_metadata.description: Metadata describing the extraction system and run that produced the structured output.

extractor_version.description: Version identifier of the extraction pipeline or schema implementation.

extraction_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the report was processed, expressed in RFC 3339 date-time format.

model_name.description: Name of the model or system used to extract the radiology facts.
